sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14618" key="a)pwne/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπωνέομαι</orth>, <sense id="n14618.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">buy, purchase,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀπωνηθήσεται</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">84</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
